WFRP_ON_THE_GO.settings.activation.enabl: Choose which GM users can see the mobile prep interface on narrow screens.
WFRP_ON_THE_GO.settings.forceMobileUi.hi: Show the mobile prep interface on this client even when the screen is wider than the threshold.
WFRP_ON_THE_GO.settings.forceMobileUi.na: Force Mobile UI On This Client
WFRP_ON_THE_GO.settings.mobileWidthThres: Use the mobile prep interface when the viewport is at or below this width.
WFRP_ON_THE_GO.settings.openDiagnosticWo: Open the temporary Vue diagnostic workbench.
WFRP_ON_THE_GO.settings.openMobileUi.hin: Open the full-screen WFRP On The Go interface.
